diagrams.title: CMM Maturity Levels Pyramid
diagrams.description: A 5-level pyramid showing the hierarchical progression of maturity levels from base to peak
diagrams.purpose: Visualize the progressive nature of process maturity and how each level builds upon previous levels

diagrams.title: CMMI Continuous vs Staged Representation
diagrams.description: Two parallel paths showing different approaches to process improvement
diagrams.purpose: Understand the two representation models in CMMI and their differences in approach

diagrams.title: PDCA Cycle Diagram
diagrams.description: Circular flow diagram showing the iterative improvement process
diagrams.purpose: Understand the continuous improvement cycle used in quality management

diagrams.title: DMAIC Process Flow
diagrams.description: Linear flowchart showing Six Sigma problem-solving methodology
diagrams.purpose: Learn the structured Six Sigma approach for process improvement

diagrams.title: ISO/IEC 15504 Process Capability Levels
diagrams.description: Six-level scale showing process capability progression
diagrams.purpose: Understand the capability scale used in SPICE assessment

visuals.title: Process Assessment And Improvement
visuals.description: Visual diagram for process assessment and improvement
